nodes.title: IMAGE STYLIZATION NOTES
widgets_values:
______________________________________________________________________________________________________

🌟 1. Realistic ➔ Illustration / Anime
______________________________________________________________________________________________________
> Use this when converting a real photographic portrait into a highly stylized, hand-drawn anime aesthetic.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎛️ Suggested KSampler Denoise: 0.60 - 0.70
🎛️ Suggested KSampler CFG     : 3.5 - 5.0
📐 DepthAnything V2 Strength : 0.70
✏️ AnyLine Lineart Strength  : 0.30
🧠 Checkpoints               : SDXL Anime / Stylized Base (e.g., Flatbread-il, Pony Diffusion, Animagine XL)
🖼️ Upscaling Model           : RealESRGAN_x4plus_anime_6B
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

📝 EasyLoader Prompts
========================
➕ Positive: highly detailed anime style, masterpiece, vibrant cel shading, expressive eyes, crisp lineart, colorful aesthetic, [describe your subject & clothing here]
➖ Negative: photorealistic, hyperrealistic, 3d render, real life, lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, blurry, deformed

🎭 FaceDetailer Prompts
========================
➕ Positive: perfect highly detailed anime face, beautiful expressive anime eyes, crisp lineart, clean shading
➖ Negative: photorealistic, realistic, 3d render, asymmetrical eyes, distorted, blurry

🤝 HandDetailer Prompts
========================
➕ Positive: perfect anime hands, well-defined fingers, clean lineart
➖ Negative: extra digits, missing fingers, deformed hands, photorealistic, realistic

___________________________________________________________________________________________________
🎨 4. Illustration / Anime ➔ Illustration / Anime
______________________________________________________________________________________________________
> Use this for style transfers between different artistic mediums (e.g., transforming a clean digital anime sketch into a classic 90s vintage cel-shaded look).
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🎛️ Suggested KSampler Denoise: 0.50 - 0.70
🎛️ Suggested KSampler CFG     : 4.0 - 6.0
📐 DepthAnything V2 Strength : 0.65
✏️ AnyLine Lineart Strength  : 0.40
🧠 Checkpoint Model          : SDXL Anime Base / Niche Style Checkpoints
🖼️ Upscaling Model           : RealESRGAN_x4plus_anime_6B
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

📝 EasyLoader Prompts
========================
➕ Positive: masterpiece illustration, [Specify New Style, e.g., 90s retro anime aesthetic, watercolor painting, detailed manga key visual], highly stylized, striking color palette
➖ Negative: photorealistic, real photo, 3d render, blender, hyperrealistic, lowres, simple background, ugly, bad hands

🎭 FaceDetailer Prompts
========================
➕ Positive: perfectly drawn stylized anime face, expressive eyes matching [Specify New Style], immaculate line art
➖ Negative: photorealistic, real life human features, messy lines, mismatched eyes

🤝 HandDetailer Prompts
========================
➕ Positive: perfectly drawn anime hands, clean linework, hands matching the illustration style
➖ Negative: extra digits, mutated digits, realistic human hands, real skin texture
______________________________________________________________________________________________________
